name: Khapri
metaTitle: Property in Khapri Nagpur | NMRDA Approved Plots | Mahalaxmi Infra
metaDescription: Buy NMRDA sanctioned, RERA approved plots in Khapri Nagpur. Starting ₹22 Lakh. Up to 90% bank finance. Contact Mahalaxmi Infra today.
heroSubheading: Airport Proximity — Nagpur's Rising Residential Zone
introduction: Khapri is a locality in Nagpur that sits in close proximity to the Dr. Babasaheb Ambedkar International Airport and the MIHAN corridor. This strategic location has made Khapri an increasingly attractive destination for residential plot investment. As MIHAN and the airport continue to drive economic activity in the area, localities like Khapri are benefiting from the overflow of demand from premium zones like Sumthana and Jamtha. Buyers who want airport-proximity plots at affordable prices should consider Khapri as a strong contender. NMRDA-approved layouts in Khapri offer legally clear investment options with good appreciation potential.
whyInvest: Close to Dr. Babasaheb Ambedkar International Airport
Benefits from MIHAN economic corridor proximity
Affordable alternative to Sumthana and Jamtha
NMRDA approved plots with bank finance available
